description: Triggers for converting documents to Markdown or JSON using Docling

queries.query: Convert this PDF to Markdown using Docling
Transform this Word document into structured Markdown
Use Docling to extract and convert my PDF report
Convert this batch of PDFs to JSON format
I need to process this scanned document — convert it to text using OCR
Convert this PowerPoint to Markdown so I can edit it programmatically
Run Docling on this document and output structured JSON
Extract text and structure from this complex PDF with tables
Convert all documents in this folder to Markdown format
I need this PDF converted to a format I can process with code
Summarize the contents of this PDF document
Transcribe this audio recording
Create a PDF from this Markdown file
Compress this PDF to reduce file size
Translate this document from French to English
Extract just the images from this PDF
Write a Python script to parse CSV files
Convert this YouTube video to text
Format my resume as a clean PDF
Convert Markdown to HTML
